ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Snooze_Alerts_Until__c) , ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_alerts_snooze__c,'') , NOT(ISBLANK(Snooze_Alerts_Until__c)) , Snooze_Alerts_Until__c >= TODAY() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: "Reason for alerts snooze" field is required when the alerts are snoozed by "Snooze Alerts Until"
